sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72504" key="oi)no/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνό-εις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσ´α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n72504.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with wine</tr_> ; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">οἰνοῦττα.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
